programmes.show_description: Sabrina Kouider. The ex-girlfriend of former Boyzone member Mark Walton was arrested for the murder of French nanny, Sophie Lionnet. Why did Sabrina Kouider brutally kill this woman? S1, Ep5
Mahmuda Khatun. 28-year-old Mahmuda Khatan stabbed her husband of only one month on his birthday. Police detectives, experts and acquaintances discuss why she murdered him. S1, Ep6
Alaska Serial Killer. In 2016, Brianna Foisy and Jason Netter are killed on an Alaskan cycle path. It's a crime that baffles police, until similar murders begin to happen. S9, Ep5
Tapes Don't Lie. In 2017, 33-year-old Michael Scott is shot dead in downtown Baltimore. Detectives are in a race against time to find the killer before he strikes again. S9, Ep6

Murder For Hire. Police arrest two conspirators in a plot to kill a woman, but in a dark twist, they accuse the victim's ex-husband of hiring them to kill his ex-wife. S7, Ep87
Toxic Death. When killers sedate their victims and disguise the crime scene, identifying the true cause of death is hard. What hard evidence is needed to help investigators? S7, Ep88
Stolen Identity. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep12
Robin the Hood. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep13
Victor Nealon And Cash Robberies. Judge Rinder examines the wrongful conviction of Victor Nealon, who was found guilty of attempted rape and sentenced to life imprisonment. S1, Ep2
Laws of Attraction. A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. When their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal. S2, Ep6
Trouble At Home. Tracie Bell has been an employee of the State Attorney's Office for over twenty years, but when she doesn't show up for work her own department must investigate. S11, Ep9
On Her Watch. In 2011, Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police turn to surveillance video - and see a brutal killer emerging from the shadows. S3, Ep5
Isabella Gossling. A vulnerable young man, allowed to live independently for the first time, is murdered in cold blood at the hands of a couple playing a warped game of deceit and lies. S1, Ep6

Moment Of Truth. When a retired firefighter goes missing, a bloody crime scene in his garage quickly indicates foul play. But has the crime scene been staged? S9, Ep13

I Loved My Daughter. In Texas, the bodies of two women lie behind a grocery store. Police turn to surveillance footage, hoping to discover who killed them - and why. S7, Ep16

programmes.show_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Lie, Cheat, Kill. As a hurricane hits Houston, a mother disappears. With resources strained and leads thin, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland for help. S1, Ep2
Playing With Fire. In 2001, someone murders a father, sets his Florida home ablaze, and his sons disappear. Now, an exclusive interview uncovers the chilling truth. S9, Ep6

Ian Huntley. The murder of 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002 shocked the UK. Experts study media interviews of their killer, Ian Huntley, to expose his lies. S2, Ep1
Virginia Vertetis. When Patrick Gilhuley was shot dead by his partner in 2014, she claimed it was self-defense, but her ex-husbands provided evidence of her violent past. S1, Ep8
The Hand-Off. In 2018, 33-year-old Joshua Webb is shot in Beckley, West Virginia. Police unravel a web of lies and follow a trail of shocking security footage to find the culprit. S9, Ep7
Toying With Us. In 2013, 35-year-old assistant manager Larry Wells is murdered in his office. Police follow a trail of surveillance footage to track down the disguised killer. S9, Ep8

Camera Clues. Forensic photographers are often first at the scene of a crime, capturing vital clues on film; but what can these pictures reveal? S1, Ep5
